description: Ensures the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA contrast ratio thresholds
help: Elements must have sufficient color contrast

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.35 (foreground color: #999999, background color: #ffffff, font size: 10.5pt, font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

description: Ensures elements have alternate text or a role of none or presentation

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element does not have an alt attribute
  aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty

Fix any of the following:
  Element does not have inner text that is visible to screen readers
  aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty

description: Ensures the order of headings is semantically correct
help: Heading levels should only increase by one

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Heading order invalid
